penalties.description: Cut path deviates outside the marked circle in several sections, particularly visible in frames 12-16 where the cutting line clearly extends beyond the circle boundary.

consensus_score.reasoning: Task completed with circle cut out by frame 21. Claude's timing of 180 seconds used as GPT's 120 seconds appears inconsistent with completion frame. Line deviation penalty retained based on Claude's specific frame references. GPT's incomplete circle penalty dropped as Claude provides evidence of successful circle removal.

disagreements.rationale: Claude's timing aligns with completion at frame 21, while GPT's 120 seconds appears inconsistent with the described completion timeline.

gpt_value.description: The marked circle was not completely freed from the gauze.

disagreements.rationale: Claude provides specific evidence that the circle was successfully removed by frame 21, contradicting GPT's incomplete assessment.
Claude's evidence of task completion supports the presence of the circle_release phase.
